changelog:
- 新增「最近更新」弹窗，升级后自动展示版本亮点
- 修复配方编辑器中撤销操作可能导致颜色数据异常的问题
- 配方替换响应更快，减少不必要的数据加载
changelog_en:
- New What's New dialog shows version highlights after updates
- Fix undo in recipe editor that could corrupt color data when adjacent regions share the same recipe
- Faster recipe replacement with reduced unnecessary data transfers
